title: Expanded Conditional Colouring for Formula Column
excerpt: Currently the conditional colouring feature doesn’t support “greater than”, “equal to”, “less than” qualifiers for the formula column. These options are available for the number column but not for the formula column. The…

posts.author: kris1 (Kristofer)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently the conditional colouring feature doesn’t support “greater than”, “equal to”, “less than” qualifiers for the formula column. These options are available for the number column but not for the formula column. The formula column needs the same functionality because most of the time the value in the formula column ends up being a number anyways.
